title: crunchy midnight mediterranean winey fondue
description: A rich and satisfying mediterranean dish, made with crunchy ingredients and a hint of wine. Enjoy with pita or crackers.
instructions: Heat a sake-warmed fondue pot over medium heat.
Add the sour cherry jam and cook until melted and fragrant.
Add the Greek olives and cook for 2 minutes, until fragrant.
Stir in a pinch of salt and a drizzle of sake.
Transfer the fondue pot to a heat-resistant surface and serve immediately with crunchy pita chips.
Dip pita chips into the fondue and enjoy the winey flavors.
Garnish with additional olives and a drizzle of sake, if desired.
Serve immediately, before the fondue has a chance to chill and thicken.
Return the fondue pot to the stovetop and reheat over medium heat, if necessary.
